view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for 'Service with product add-on' is satisfied as evidenced by the successful booking of a service that includes a product.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for 'Service with product add-on' is satisfied as evidenced by the successful booking of a service that includes a product.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement by demonstrating that a service (haircut) is offered alongside a product (shampoo/conditioner) as part of the 'Luxury Hair Package'. The evidence from the booking process confirms that the service can be bundled with a product, fulfilling the requirement. Specifically, the booking order evidence shows a total of $150 for the service, which aligns with the use case's description of a service with a product add-on.
